name: Deploy Static Website on: push: branches: ["main"] # 수동 실행 허용 (테스트용) workflow_dispatch: permissions: contents: read pages: write id-token: write # 동시에 여러 배포가 진행되지 않도록 설정 concurrency: group: "pages" cancel-in-progress: true jobs: deploy: environment: name: github-pages url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }} runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4 # v4의 최신 패치는 Node 20+를 지원합니다. - name: Setup Pages uses: actions/configure-pages@v5 - name: Upload artifact uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3 with: # 만약 index.html이 루트에 있다면 '.', # dist 폴더 안에 있다면 'dist'로 수정하세요. path: '.' - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages id: deployment uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
